name: ClientSpace
description: Dual-role client portal: admins manage clients, projects, tasks, and file sharing; clients get a focused view of their work. React, Node.js, and Supabase with row-level security.
thumbnailAlt: ClientSpace login screen for the admin and client portal

name: Auction.io
description: Fantasy sports auction admin: teams, player pools, bidding flow, and dashboards. Angular with Supabase auth and PostgreSQL.
thumbnailAlt: Auction.io admin dashboard showing team and player management

name: The Bridge CRM
description: Enterprise CRM built from scratch into the operational platform for The Bridge community — managing operations, events, registrations, and administration. Angular SSR frontend with a Node and Express API layer.

details.problem: The Bridge community needed a centralized platform to manage operations, events, member registrations, and administration — replacing fragmented spreadsheets and manual workflows.
details.role: Sole architect. Designed the data model and API layer from scratch, built the Angular SSR frontend, and delivered the platform end-to-end from first commit to production.
highlights: Architected and shipped the entire CRM from zero
Designed and implemented 40+ REST APIs with Node and Express
Now the operational backbone for The Bridge community
Supports event management, registrations, and member administration

name: HR AI Recruitment Platform
description: AI-powered recruitment automation: candidate ranking, matching, and sourcing workflows built with the OpenAI API, browser automation, scraping, and backend APIs.

details.problem: Manual recruitment was slow and inconsistent — recruiters spent hours screening resumes, sourcing candidates, and ranking applicants without standardized criteria.
details.role: Built the AI pipeline end-to-end: OpenAI-powered candidate ranking and matching, Playwright-based browser automation for sourcing, and the backend APIs tying it all together.
highlights: Automated candidate ranking and matching using OpenAI APIs
Built browser automation for scraping and sourcing with Playwright
Reduced manual screening time significantly for recruiters
Designed backend APIs powering the full recruitment workflow

name: MotoExpert
description: Automotive product spanning web, backend, and mobile. Modernized the stack across React Native, Angular, Express, and Prisma.

details.problem: An established automotive platform needed modernization across web, mobile, and backend to improve performance, maintainability, and user experience.
details.role: Worked across all three surfaces — contributing to the React Native mobile app, Angular web frontend, and Express/Prisma backend to modernize the stack incrementally.
highlights: Contributed across web, mobile, and backend codebases
Modernized legacy code to React Native, Angular, Express, and Prisma
Improved API performance with Prisma ORM and structured queries
Shipped features across platforms in coordinated releases

name: AgentMesh
description: AI-driven profile matching platform with authentication, backend APIs, and intelligent recommendations powered by the OpenAI API.

details.problem: Connecting the right professionals required more than keyword search — the platform needed intelligent, context-aware profile matching and recommendations.
details.role: Built the authentication system, backend APIs, and OpenAI-powered recommendation engine that drives intelligent profile matching.
highlights: Designed AI-driven matching using OpenAI for intelligent recommendations
Built authentication and authorization from scratch
Developed backend APIs with Node.js and PostgreSQL
Delivered context-aware profile suggestions beyond simple keyword search
